title: Mob Banners
description: Adds decorative banners to commemorate your combat conquests.
body:
This mod adds mob banners to your game. A mob banner is a decorative block that has different variant for every mob in the game. Players can receive a banner by killing the same mob at least 50 times. For example if you kill 50 zombies you will get the zombie banner. Placing the banner will give nearby mobs of the same type as the banner a small slowness and weakness debuff.

Additional Notes

  • This mod will work for any mob that has a spawn egg, yes even modded mobs.
  • Kills are only tracked after the mod has been installed. Previous kills will not count.
  • You must kill 50 of the same mob. This amount is configurable.
  • Players will only get one banner of each type.
  • You can disable the debuffs effect in the config file.
